content:
[SYSTEM ALERT] @Roger: A task has been assigned to you: Task #2ce5dc08-bb8d-4f27-b812-ca91a6b20f21 - "Phase 0: The Root Directory Purge". Priority: critical.
Description: Before we even touch the application logic, we need to address the root directory. Right now, there are dozens of ghost scripts (`fix_*.js`, `test_*.js`, `check_*.js`, `scratch_*.js`). We should start by sweeping all of these either into the trash or into a dedicated `/archive/scripts/` folder. This will immediately reduce the noise and prevent situations like the rogue `app.js` file hijacking the Vercel deployment.

Please review it and take necessary actions.
